title: Vanilla-Sugar
description: VANILLA+ modpack, adds Mods, Recourse Packs & Shaders!
body:
## Feautures:
- Mods (Sodium, Iris, Terralith, Tectonic, Dungeons and Taverns & more)
- Shaders (Complementary, BSL, MakeUP - Ultra Fast)
- Recourse Packs (Bare Bones, Fresh Animations, rotrBLOCKS & more)

### Why Vanilla Sugar?
Vanilla is good, but Vanilla Sugar just tastes better. This means this modpack is like Vanilla but better (Vanilla+)

Enjoy playing\
-Jonkl <3
